added: Aethvion Audio: Standalone audio editor module with full FastAPI backend (port 8083)
Aethvion Audio: Real-time waveform visualization powered by WaveSurfer.js
Aethvion Audio: Region-based selection for precise trim and silence operations

Aethvion Audio: Unlimited undo history and one-click reset to original
Aethvion Audio: Multi-format export — WAV (native), MP3 and OGG (via FFmpeg)
Aethvion Audio: Drag-and-drop file loading (WAV, MP3, OGG, FLAC)
Aethvion Audio: Start_Audio.bat startup script with automatic dependency installation
Aethvion Photo: Universal workspace for text-to-image synthesis and manipulation
Aethvion Photo: Layer-based canvas engine with transparency and non-destructive filtering
Aethvion Photo: AI Background Removal tool integrated directly into the workspace
Aethvion Photo: Real-time per-layer CSS filters (Brightness, Contrast, Saturation, etc.)
Dashboard: Dedicated Suite Mode for cross-repo application management
Dashboard: Mode-specific navigation layouts for Enterprise and R&D workspaces
Dashboard: Aethvion Audio registered in module map, sidebar, and hub card
Dashboard: Audio module status badge integrated into live port polling

Local Models: One-click install and remove functionality for supported models
Chat: Detailed token use information for Auto-routed responses

UI: Persistent system-wide status telemetry (Tokens, Cost, Agents, Tools) across all modes
UI: Dynamic versioning in the Hub hero section powered by system-status.json
improved: System: Rebranded all core and interface elements to Aethvion Suite
System: Fixed Smart Tab startup check to correctly handle rebranded window titles
UI: Refined sidebar organization with mode-filtered categories and items
UI: Automated hero section cleanup — removed redundant status badges
Chat: Reduced information bloat for a cleaner conversational experience
Settings: Expanded suggested models library for easier configuration
Persona: Updated default typing speed to 75 for Assistant and Misaka Cipher
Aethvion VTuber: Improved layout for better workflow focus
changed: Navigation: Reorganized dashboard hierarchy to prioritize Misaka Cipher and Creative workflows
Aethvion Modules: Strategic relocation of standalone apps to the Suite management hub
Hub Card: Aethvion Audio activated — removed 'Coming Soon' state
Repo Architecture: Renamed from Misaka-Cipher to Aethvion-Suite
Repo Architecture: Replaced Specter/Synapse modules with standalone VTuber and Tracking apps
Repo Architecture: Relocated Nexus Models to the core source directory
Misaka Cipher: Implemented 'Hide Character' display option

added: VTuber Module: v2.0 Release — full standalone rigging engine
VTuber Module: Custom .specter ZIP format (manifest + model + textures)
VTuber Module: 8-mode Editor (Mesh, Bones, Weights, Physics, Preview, Live)
VTuber Module: AI-assisted mesh topology and vertex weight prediction
VTuber Module: WebGL rendering with CPU-side Linear Blend Skinning
VTuber Module: Spring physics bone chain simulation for hair and accessories
VTuber Module: Integrated Documentation and Tutorial pages
Tracking Module: AI-powered motion tracking bridge (initial release)
Tracking Module: High-precision Face Tracking via modern MediaPipe Tasks API
Tracking Module: Face Blendshapes integration for accurate eye/mouth sync
Tracking Module: Support for dual optical capture (Webcam and Monitor)
Tracking Module: Live raw preview mode with persistent MJPEG fallback streaming
Tracking Module: Centralized CaptureManager to manage hardware mutex
Port Manager: Universal dynamic port allocation and registration system

Sidebar: Integrated Aethvion Modules (VTuber/Tracking) with dynamic launch support
Word Search: AI Puzzle mode — generate themed grids from any topic via ProviderManager
Word Search: Topic input field and AI Puzzle button in the game toolbar
Word Search: Topic badge displayed in the word list sidebar during AI-generated puzzles
Word Search: Grid shimmer loading animation while AI generates a word list
improved: VTuber Module: Decoupled architecture for full standalone operation
VTuber Module: Enhanced v1 → v2 model auto-migration on load
Files Dashboard: Intelligent backend caching and immediate UI responsiveness

changed: VTuber Module: Replaced directory-based storage with single-file archives

added: Nexus Module: Full bidirectional Discord messaging bridge

modes.name: Arena Battle Mode

modes.desc: Assign personas to multiple models and watch them interact autonomously about the starting prompt.

modes.name: Aethvion Audio

tooling.name: Python Package Manager
tooling.desc: Install and manage dependencies directly from the dashboard.

tooling.name: Environment (.env) Manager
tooling.desc: Securely handle API keys and system variables without leaving the UI.

telemetry.name: Live Token & Cost Tracking
telemetry.desc: Real-time usage analytics and estimated cost calculation per provider.

telemetry.desc: Local telemetry for CPU, RAM, and system resource usage.

security.name: Intelligence Firewall
security.desc: Configurable safety filters and system-level prompt overrides.

security.name: Trace IDs
security.desc: Unique identifiers for auditing and tracking multi-step LLM reasoning.

interface.name: Web Dashboard
interface.desc: A clean, responsive UI for managing all aspects of the Aethvion node.

interface.name: Intelligent Chat Interface
interface.desc: Instant thread creation with seamless auto-titling and persistent layout memory across modes.

interface.name: Discord Bridge Integrations
interface.desc: Full two-way communication with Discord servers and secured direct-messaging tools.

assistant.name: Aethvion Suite Assistant
assistant.desc: Can help you with your tasks and understanding Aethvion Suite and its features.

memory.name: Conversation - Evolving Context
memory.desc: Dynamic memory system that extracts facts, traits, and context to reduce token bloat while maintaining long-term persona growth across platforms.

modes.name: Autonomous Agents
modes.desc: Goal-oriented agents capable of multi-step planning and file manipulation.

research.name: Advanced AI Conversations
research.desc: Advanced sandbox to study how AI traits shift through prolonged interaction.

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.desc: Universal adapter to access hundreds of models with a single key.

infrastructure.name: Local Model Support (Ollama)
infrastructure.desc: Run uncensored, open-source models completely offline.

infrastructure.name: vLLM Integration
infrastructure.desc: High-throughput serving for local large language models.

infrastructure.name: Vector DB / RAG
infrastructure.desc: Drop-in document processing and semantic search capabilities.

interface.name: Native Voice Interaction
interface.desc: Speech-to-text and text-to-speech for hands-free operation.

interface.name: Dark/Light Theme Engine
interface.desc: Customizable UI themes beyond the default styling.

modules.name: Nexus Module
modules.desc: The central bridge between Aethvion and external hardware/software.

features.name: Media Sentinel (SMTC)
features.desc: Real-time detection of system-wide media playback (Spotify, YouTube, etc.).

features.name: Spotify Integration
features.desc: OAuth2 powered link to play, pause, and control your Spotify account.

features.name: Discord Bridge Integration
features.desc: Bi-directional bot integration supporting full sentient text chat, token persistence, and image uploads in servers and DMs.

wip.name: Local File Indexing
wip.desc: Scanning of specific directories to allow Misaka to understand your local file structure better.

planned.name: Home Automation Link
planned.desc: Integration with Home Assistant / Philips Hue for physical environmental control.

planned.name: System Task Scheduler
planned.desc: Allow the system to schedule tasks like system updates or backups.

modules.name: Aethvion VTuber
modules.desc: Professional character engine — rig, animate, and manage 2D avatar models with AI assistance.

features.name: Character Rigging Editor
features.desc: 8-mode editor for mesh, bone, weight, physics, and preview workflows.

features.name: Integrated Model Format
features.desc: Custom ZIP-based format containing manifest, full model data, and embedded textures.

features.name: AI-Assisted Rigging
features.desc: Auto-generate mesh topology, bone hierarchies, and vertex weights.

features.name: High-Performance Rendering
features.desc: WebGL-based deformation system for smooth real-time animation.

features.name: Dynamic Physics
features.desc: Real-time physics simulation for hair and accessories.

features.name: Technical Documentation
features.desc: Built-in technical reference and beginner tutorials viewable alongside the editor.

wip.name: Face Tracking Integration
wip.desc: Live tracking via bridge interface — supports multiple tracking backends.

planned.name: AI Character Asset Generation
planned.desc: Generate full character assets and layers end-to-end.

modules.name: Aethvion Tracking
modules.desc: Universal tracking bridge for optical and data-driven motion capture.

features.name: Precision AI Tracking
features.desc: High-precision facial capture using modern AI blendshapes.

features.name: Flexible Input Sources
features.desc: Switch effortlessly between webcam feeds and desktop monitor regions.

features.name: Real-time Monitoring
features.desc: Verify tracking alignment with low-latency visual feedback.

features.name: Resource Management
features.desc: Centralized hardware management preventing camera and screen capture conflicts.

wip.name: Professional Backend Support
wip.desc: Implementing backends for professional desktop-based tracking systems.

planned.name: Full Body Tracking
planned.desc: Expanding engine to support full-body motion capture.

modules.name: Aethvion Audio
modules.desc: Professional standalone audio editor with waveform visualization, effects, and multi-format export.

features.name: Waveform Visualization
features.desc: Real-time interactive waveform display powered by WaveSurfer.js with region selection.

features.name: Region-Based Editing
features.desc: Click-drag to select regions for trimming, silencing, or targeted effect application.

features.name: Effects Pipeline
features.desc: Fade In/Out, Normalize, Gain (±20 dB), Reverse, Speed control (0.25×–4×), and Crop Silence.

features.name: Format Tools
features.desc: Stereo-to-Mono and Mono-to-Stereo conversion with full resampling support (8kHz–96kHz).

features.name: Undo & Reset
features.desc: Unlimited undo history with one-click reset to the original loaded file.

features.name: Multi-Format Export
features.desc: Export edited audio as WAV (native), MP3, or OGG (FFmpeg required for compressed formats).

wip.name: Multi-Track Mixing
wip.desc: Layer multiple audio tracks with individual volume and pan controls.

planned.name: Spectral View
planned.desc: Frequency-domain visualization for surgical noise removal and EQ editing.

modules.name: Aethvion Photo
modules.desc: Universal workspace for text-to-image synthesis and manipulation.

features.name: Layer-Based Canvas Engine
features.desc: Professional grade canvas supporting multiple layers, transparency, and non-destructive filtering.

features.name: AI Background Removal
features.desc: Integrated 'Remove Background' tool powered by high-precision AI models.

features.name: Live Filtering
features.desc: Real-time CSS-based filters (Brightness, Contrast, Saturation, etc.) applied per-layer.

wip.name: Advanced AI Generation
wip.desc: Deeper integration with local and cloud-based image gen models.

planned.name: Batch Processing
planned.desc: Automation for repetitive image editing tasks.
